module.name: iarrow
module.description: Inline arrow that flows WITHIN text (unlike @arrow, which is a centered block). Sized in em to match the surrounding text.
module.aiSpec:
An INLINE arrow glyph that sits inside a line of text — use it for "leads to" between words, e.g. `input <!-- @iarrow --> output` or `A <!-- @iarrow shape: line --> B`. It inherits the text colour by default and is sized in `em` so it matches the font. This is different from `@arrow`, which renders as a large CENTERED block between paragraphs. Inline module, no body.
Parameters: - `direction`: one of 8 compass points — right (default), left, up, down, up-right, up-left, down-right, down-left. Rotates the glyph. - `shape`: line (default), triangle, chevron, double. - `size`: CSS length relative to text (default 1em, e.g. 1.2em). - `color`: any CSS colour (default currentColor = the surrounding text colour). - `weight` (thin|normal|bold, default normal): stroke thickness of the outline shapes (line/chevron/double); triangle is a solid fill and ignores it. - `spacing` (tight|normal|wide, default normal): horizontal space around the arrow.
Example: <!-- @iarrow shape: chevron, direction: right, weight: bold, color: #ef4444 -->

param.name: direction
param.label: Direction
param.desc: Which compass direction the arrow points.

param.name: size
param.label: Size
param.desc: CSS size relative to text, e.g. 1em, 1.2em.

param.name: color
param.label: Color
param.desc: Defaults to the surrounding text colour.

snippet.label: Inline arrow (arrow)
snippet.description: A right-pointing arrow that flows within a line of text (input -> output).
